articles.full_body:
Title: CBA三消息：朱芳雨新岗位出炉，刘炜不淡定，山西男篮不讲情面

URL Source: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijAFBVV95cUxPS05fZG8zWWI5aEtad3RhSnZmRWJEQ1AtRjk5SzI5Umo0WGdORjdySTNNMUlXcHJZSE5ZSWtqaXJRUUNPSThidUZhdUpFT0xEM1BWU1hIX05nVDR1aWNWX1NOcEE4OF95SHFmMlNmSEc3ZUlfTVRaTldIb1JCWkN2MFVFaWh3ME41Z3R1cg

Published Time: 2026-07-23T08:00:56+08:00

Markdown Content:
顶部

[首页](https://m.sohu.com/?spm=smwp.content-abroad.fx.2.1784769421442HLRAdlV)

[首页](https://m.sohu.com/?spm=smwp.content-abroad.nav.1.1784769421442HLRAdlV)

[阴/22°](https://weather.sohu.com/?spm=smwp.content-abroad.nav.weathericon.1784769421442HLRAdlV)

[![Image 4](https://q16477799cada3.cdn.sohucs.com/C100011/1375df4aaa46486497626eff48fc6bed.png)隐私](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijAFBVV95cUxPS05fZG8zWWI5aEtad3RhSnZmRWJEQ1AtRjk5SzI5Umo0WGdORjdySTNNMUlXcHJZSE5ZSWtqaXJRUUNPSThidUZhdUpFT0xEM1BWU1hIX05nVDR1aWNWX1NOcEE4OF95SHFmMlNmSEc3ZUlfTVRaTldIb1JCWkN2MFVFaWh3ME41Z3R1cg)

## 原创 CBA三消息：朱芳雨新岗位出炉，刘炜不淡定，山西男篮不讲情面

[![Image 5: 子瑜体育](https://p2.itc.cn/q_70,c_lfill,w_60,h_60,g_face/images03/20221019/d37b46c6ab374d158d71426273969e52.jpeg) 子瑜体育 2026-07-23 08:00](https://m.sohu.com/media/121501772?spm=smwp.content-abroad.author-info.1.1784769421442HLRAdlV)

广东宏远官网显示，球队执行了奎因和萨姆纳两位外援的优先签约权，这也意味着在新赛季3外援的背景下，广东队只需要补充一名大外援就可以。值得一提的是，CBA自由市场上只有莫兰德、克里斯和法耶3名中锋，难道莫兰德又要重返广东队吗？

八字没一撇的事，我们先别浪费时间讨论，还是先看看CBA这一天发生了哪些事情。我特别从中收集了3个热度高的消息分享给大家，总结成一句就是：朱芳雨新岗位出炉，刘炜不淡定，山西男篮不讲情面。

**一，朱芳雨新岗位出炉**

朱芳雨不急着挑大外援，跑到天津来干什么，原因是为了参加NYBO全国青少年篮球联赛，这可不是一个小众项目，就连姚明也亲自参加了。更重要的是，朱芳雨并不是来看热闹的，而是以领队的身份参赛。

![Image 6: 图片](https://q2.itc.cn/images01/20260723/a1991096dad048258f0dd2cc14e98186.jpeg)

众所周知，朱芳雨在广东开设了篮球训练营，属于广东老牌青训机构，并取得了骄人的成绩。得益于丰富的篮球资源，专业的训练团队和固定的训练体系，以及广东本土浓厚的篮球氛围，培养了一批又一批篮球人才。

[展开剩余 64 %](javascript:;)

朱芳雨与杜锋不同，后者有体制内职务，并不担心下课，如果朱芳雨下课就失业了。所以，他得为自己找到退路。毕竟广东宏远这几个赛季成绩下滑，压力山大，随时都有下课的风险。显然，青训机构可以为他托底。

**二，刘炜不淡定了**

为什么刘炜不淡定了？原来洛夫顿收到了来自欧洲3支球队报价，如果不匹配的话，洛夫顿下个赛季就不能代表上海队征战CBA。不可否认的是，洛夫顿是上海卫冕冠军不可或缺的一环，他的作用无人可以替代，特别是怀特塞德丑闻曝光后。

![Image 7: 图片](https://q7.itc.cn/images01/20260723/b3b71d3c960f48bf8a593927d57f7de4.jpeg)

上个赛季洛夫顿场均20分钟可以得到13分6篮板3.5助攻1抢断，攻防两端都十分突出。有欧洲球队主动报价也在情理之中，当然，也不排除洛夫顿经纪分司以此来加薪，这在谈判中是最常见的手段之一。

无论如何，对于上海队来说，这都不是一个好消息。如果被欧洲球队挖走，球队实力将下降一个档次。如果洛夫顿想涨薪，CBA的外援工资帽只有425万美元，上海队虽然不差钱，但也要考虑到其他外援年合同。

**三，山西男篮不讲情面**

山西男篮没有执行迪亚洛的优先签约权，这也意味着他已经自由球队，CBA其他球队可以随着签下他，不过，目前并没有一支球队对他表示有意。不少球迷认为山西队不讲情面，队内得分王就这样放弃了。

![Image 8: 图片](https://q5.itc.cn/images01/20260723/28cb109655e04632a0e5104e30c8482c.jpeg)

其实，背后是有故事的。原来山西男篮想用180万续约迪亚洛，但是他却不愿意，一定要涨到220万才肯留队。山西队不是傻子，上海队的夺冠功勋古德温年薪才200万，迪亚洛凭什么要220万？

迪亚洛常规赛还行，但是到了季后赛就掉链子，场均只有11分5篮板1.6助攻，投篮命中率45%，三分球更是不敢出手，这也成为山西首轮出局的主要原因。季后赛才是检验一名球星的舞台，迪亚洛如此拉胯根本不值这个价。

发布于：福建省

# McInnes glad of Rangers backing in appeal against ban

![Image 1: Derek McInnes made his home bow as Rangers boss in a friendly win over St Etienne](https://ichef.bbci.co.uk/ace/standard/800/cpsprodpb/ad2e/live/99a241b0-861c-11f1-aba5-dfbb15fd1ac1.jpg)Image source, SNS

Image caption, 

Derek McInnes made his home bow as Rangers boss in a friendly win over St Etienne

*   Published 22 July 2026 

Updated 2 hours ago

**Derek McInnes insists Rangers are right to contest the four-match touchline ban he has received for describing as "disgusting" the decision to award Celtic a late penalty at Motherwell in May.**

The comments, made at the end of last season when McInnes was in charge of Hearts, related to a stoppage-time spot-kick for handball that was converted by Kelechi Iheanacho.

[Celtic's 3-2 victory at Fir Park](https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/football/live/c3627z3828gt) on 13 May kept them one point behind Hearts, who they beat to the title a few days later in a final-day decider.

Responding to the Scottish FA penalty, which is an immediate three-game ban with one suspended until the end of the season, Rangers say the remarks were "directed at the decision, rather than representing any broader criticism of officials".

And, following a friendly victory over over St Etienne at Ibrox, McInnes added: "I don't agree with it and the club don't agree with it. I'm glad that we're going to appeal against that.

"I've been a manager for 19 years and you know you're going to be asked about contentious decisions and all the rest of it.

"I've never wanted to make it personal. For me, the decision was wrong. I feel as though I made my points at the hearing.

"Broadcasters pay a lot of money to hear managers' reactions. We've got to be careful that we don't have managers and players who have to be really sure of themselves and check themselves before answering a question.

"At no point was I wanting to inflame a situation.

"The situation was already being discussed before I did my press. It was quite a big moment in the season and there was a lot of emotion, but I felt as though what I said was controlled."

Speaking to Sky Sports after a win against Falkirk at Tynecastle on the same night as Celtic's win at Fir Park, McInnes said: "When you heard Celtic got a 96th-minute penalty that was going to VAR and they were checking it, you just assume what's happened is they get the penalty.

"Having seen it again, it's disgusting. It is. I don't think it's
articles.image_credit: 伊恩每日 · 本地题图
